name: Acme Backend Service Onboarding — Instruction Dataset
description: Illustrative instruction-tuning dataset derived from the software-onboarding OKPF example pack. All content is fictional placeholder data for OKPF format demonstration purposes.

size.note: This is a minimal illustrative dataset. Real instruction datasets contain thousands of examples.

intended_use: Format demonstration and OKPF tooling tests only. Not for production model training.
out_of_scope_use: Any use that requires real software project data
limitations: All data is fictional — invented for format demonstration.
Far too small for meaningful fine-tuning.
Not tokenized for any specific model.
